lines.english: Whatever pleases Him, comes to pass.
In various costumes, like actors, they appear.
As it pleases God, they dance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸੁ ਅਸਥਾਨ ਤੇ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aus asathaan te bahur na aavai |
lines.english: From that place, he does not have to come back again.
O Nanak, there is no other at all. ||7||
Sometimes, this being attains the Company of the Holy.
That place does not perish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਇਕ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: man tan naam rate ik rang |
lines.english: The mind and body are imbued with the Love of the Naam, the Name of the One Lord.
The light of spiritual wisdom dawns within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਮਹਿ ਜਲੁ ਆਇ ਖਟਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jal meh jal aae khattaanaa |
lines.english: As water comes to blend with water,
his light blends into the Light.
He dwells forever with the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੀ ਬਸੈ ਮਸਕੀਨੀਆ ਆਪੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਤਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: sukhee basai masakeeneea aap nivaar tale |
lines.english: The humble beings abide in peace; subduing egotism, they are meek.
Salok:
Reincarnation is ended, and eternal peace is found.
Nanak is forever a sacrifice to God. ||8||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਡੇ ਬਡੇ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਗਰਬਿ ਗਲੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: badde badde ahankaareea naanak garab gale |1|
lines.english: The very proud and arrogant persons, O Nanak, are consumed by their own pride. ||1||
Ashtapadee:
One who has the pride of power within,
One who deems himself to have the beauty of youth,
shall dwell in hell, and become a dog.
shall become a maggot in manure.
One who claims to act virtuously,
is a fool, blind and ignorant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਭੂਮਿ ਕਾ ਜੋ ਕਰੈ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhan bhoom kaa jo karai gumaan |
lines.english: One who takes pride in wealth and lands
shall live and die, wandering through countless reincarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਈਹਾ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਆਗੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak eehaa mukat aagai sukh paavai |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, is liberated here, and obtains peace hereafter. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਗਰੀਬੀ ਬਸਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa jis kai hiradai gareebee basaavai |
lines.english: One whose heart is mercifully blessed with abiding humility,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਣ ਸਮਾਨਿ ਕਛੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਜਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: trin samaan kachh sang na jaavai |
lines.english: not even a piece of straw shall go along with him.
One who becomes wealthy and takes pride in it

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਲਸਕਰ ਮਾਨੁਖ ਊਪਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: bahu lasakar maanukh aoopar kare aas |
lines.english: He may place his hopes on a large army of men,
in an instant, shall be reduced to ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਲ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਨਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: pal bheetar taa kaa hoe binaas |
lines.english: but he shall vanish in an instant.
One who deems himself to be the strongest of all,
O Nanak, becomes acceptable in the Court of the Lord. ||2||
One who thinks of no one else except his own prideful self

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਮਿਟੈ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad jaa kaa mittai abhimaan |
lines.english: One who, by Guru's Grace, eliminates his ego,
the Righteous Judge of Dharma shall expose his disgrace.
he shall incur only trouble; all this is in vain.
If someone does millions of good deeds, while acting in ego,
If someone performs great penance, while acting in selfishness and conceit,
he shall be reincarnated into heaven and hell, over and over again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਜਤਨ ਕਰਿ ਆਤਮ ਨਹੀ ਦ੍ਰਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: anik jatan kar aatam nahee dravai |
lines.english: He makes all sorts of efforts, but his soul is still not softened

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਕੀ ਰੇਨ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sarab kee ren jaa kaa man hoe |
lines.english: One whose mind is the dust of all
One who calls himself good
how can he go to the Court of the Lord?
goodness shall not draw near him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਜਾਨੈ ਮੁਝ ਤੇ ਕਛੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag jaanai mujh te kachh hoe |
lines.english: As long as someone thinks that he is the one who acts,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਇਸ ਕਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tab is kau sukh naahee koe |
lines.english: he shall have no peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak taa kee niramal soe |3|
lines.english: - says Nanak, his reputation is spotlessly pure. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਗਰਭ ਜੋਨਿ ਮਹਿ ਫਿਰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: tab lag garabh jon meh firataa |
lines.english: he shall wander in reincarnation through the womb.
As long as he considers one an enemy, and another a friend,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਇਹ ਜਾਨੈ ਮੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jab ih jaanai mai kichh karataa |
lines.english: As long as this mortal thinks that he is the one who does things,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਦੇਇ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tab lag dharam raae dee sajaae |
lines.english: the Righteous Judge shall punish him.
his mind shall not come to rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਮੋਹ ਮਗਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag moh magan sang maae |
lines.english: As long as he is intoxicated with attachment to Maya,
By God's Grace, his bonds are shattered;
by Guru's Grace, O Nanak, his ego is eliminated. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸ ਖਟੇ ਲਖ ਕਉ ਉਠਿ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sehas khatte lakh kau utth dhaavai |
lines.english: Earning a thousand, he runs after a hundred thousand.
